subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Nazim, master of verses! The flowing poems of Aqa Mirza 'Ali-Akbar were read and found to be sweet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب ناظم دراری اشعار آقا میرزا علی اکبر اشعار آبدار قرائت گردید ملیح بود
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts
